name: Resource Creation
description: Explore flows that allow you to easily create various resources with only a few clicks. These flows save precious time when setting up dedicated assets across different use cases.

entries.name: Add Worker Group
entries.description:
Important: Edit this flow and set your instance IP or FQDN in the Start block. 
Optional: Choose a role that will get access to the new worker group. Default: everyone
Flow process: Validates all inputs. Creates a Worker Group on the given instance using the provided group name and description. Generates a group secret. Returns a validated configuration for the Docker based remote worker. Values needed to set up the Kubernetes based remote worker can be pulled from this output.

entries.name: Create Google Sheet
entries.description: Takes an array of arrays or an array of objects and creates a Google Sheet having the given name and containing the given data under the account for the given Google authKey

entries.name: Clone VM From VM Template v7
